title: Is Humanity Doomed? ft. Graham Hancock

transcript.text: I have no respect for any single leader
in the world today I don't care what
party they're from I don't care what
country they're the leader of I don't
have respect for any of them what
they're not they're not leaders they're
misleaders they're pursuing their own
agendas and deceiving the public in
order to get support behind those
agendas we need a whole new way to
function in the world if humanity is
going to continue as a species if
anybody cares about that and I certainly
do I I have I have nine grandchildren I
don't want them to grow up in a world
that's that's suddenly devastated by a
nuclear Holocaust because of the
stupidity the idiocy the
irresponsibility and and and the marcho
attitudes of these teenagers in Old
bodies who are running the world thank
you yeah that was beautiful
